description: User invokes /start-review-team with no flags. Config provides default roster of code-reviewer + security-reviewer.
assertion: command received; params are empty; config provides default roster

description: Name resolved to 'review-pool' (default); roster validated against known agents. Both checks pass.
assertion: resolved_name is 'review-pool'; roster contains exactly code-reviewer and security-reviewer; both flags true

description: Cross-session lock acquired via mkdir .index.lock before any filesystem writes.
assertion: lock_path ends with .index.lock; lock_acquired is true; method is mkdir

description: config.json written with pool_state: idle and last_active_at equal to spawn timestamp. index.json updated atomically via .index.json.tmp rename. Spawn prompts embedded.

spawn_prompts.pool_lead:
You are the Pool Lead for standing pool 'review-pool'.
### Standing Pool Identity Confirm Overlay
You are a persistent standing-pool agent.
### Standing Pool Lifecycle Overlay
Monitor TTL and manage pool lifecycle.
spawn_prompts.reviewer_code_reviewer:
You are code-reviewer in standing pool 'review-pool'.
### Standing Pool Identity Confirm Overlay
You are a persistent standing-pool agent.
spawn_prompts.reviewer_security_reviewer:
You are security-reviewer in standing pool 'review-pool'.
### Standing Pool Identity Confirm Overlay
You are a persistent standing-pool agent.

assertion: config_json.pool_state is idle; spawn_prompts.pool_lead contains Standing Pool Identity Confirm Overlay verbatim; index_json in sync

description: User sees confirmation: pool name, roster, TTL. No cost warning because roster has only 2 reviewers (below D16 threshold).
assertion: cost_warning_shown is false (roster size 2, below threshold); pool_name is review-pool; ttl_minutes is 60
